query: Great, that clarification is resolved. Will it run tonight?
expected_behavior: Correctly states the task will run on the next eligible nightly tick ONLY if the project is opted in (enabled: true in AGENDA.md frontmatter)
If the project's enabled status is unknown, checks or asks rather than assuming it will run
If the project is still dormant, explicitly states that python3 tools/wiki.py project agenda enable <slug> is needed first
Does not claim the resolved task runs immediately or on the current invocation
